assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Clearly states in Step 1 to upgrade control plane first with specific gcloud command and verification steps

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states upgrade order as 'Coordinators → Data → Masters' with rationale that this minimizes disruption and protects master quorum last

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions at the end that 'regional pd-ssd volumes will automatically reattach to new nodes, so data persistence is protected throughout the process'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB configuration for master nodes with minAvailable=2 and explains it's to 'keep 2 for quorum'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud commands setting --max-surge-upgrade 1 and --max-unavailable-upgrade 0 for all three node pools (coordinator, data, master)

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes curl commands to check cluster health after each node pool upgrade and explicitly states to 'Wait for green health - After each pool, ensure cluster returns to green before continuing'

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes specific kubectl command to verify PV reclaim policy and ensure it's 'Retain' not 'Delete'

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl rollout status commands for both data and master StatefulSets: 'kubectl rollout status statefulset/elasticsearch-data' and 'kubectl rollout status statefulset/elasticsearch-master'

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes application-level backup with specific curl command to create snapshot: 'curl -X PUT elasticsearch-service:9200/_snapshot/backup-repo/pre-upgrade-snapshot'
